title: memorialis hispida var. gardneriana
intro: Memorialis hispida var. gardneriana, commonly known as the Spotted Spilanthes, is a plant species within the family Acanthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its numerous health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The therapeutic actions of Spilanthes include wound healing, pain relief, and immune system modulation, attributed to its bioactive constituents such as flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic acids. The bioactive constituents in Spilanthes have been shown to exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities, contributing to its potential therapeutic applications.

side_effects: Memorialis hispida var. gardneriana can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing skin irritation, allergic reactions, and gastrointestinal problems due to its high sap content.
